title: Portfolio and OTC Market are live with early-stage investments
content_html:
Cryptool has officially launched the Portfolio and OTC Market modules, now including early-stage crypto investments.

Portfolio

  • Track crypto holdings from one place
  • View status, vesting schedules and next unlock dates
  • Monitor performance and historical trends
  • Manage early-stage investments alongside the rest of your portfolio

OTC Market

  • Trade both vested and unvested tokens directly
  • Execute large-volume trades safely and efficiently
  • Access exclusive early-stage investment opportunities
  • Transparent pricing and fast settlement

This release brings together the full Cryptool stack: fundraising, portfolio management and OTC, all on one platform.
author: Cryptool
